pr.title: ⚡ LegacyFix: 2004 lines modernized by Replit Agent
pr.body:
## ⚡ LegacyFix — Automated Legacy Code Modernizer

> Generated by [LegacyFix](https://legacyfix.replit.app) powered by Replit Agent

### Summary
- **6 files** modernized
- **2004 lines** updated
- Review changes before merging

### What was changed
# ⚡ LegacyFix Report

**Repository:** `psf/requests`
**Generated:** 2026-05-02 16:07 UTC
**Total lines modernized:** 2004
**Files changed:** 6

## Changes

| File | Lines Changed | Modernization | Security Notes |
|------|--------------|---------------|----------------|
| `src/requests/cookies.py` | 3 | 🐍 Python 2→3 | — |
| `src/requests/utils.py` | 1041 | 🐍 Python 2→3 | — |
| `tests/test_lowlevel.py` | 2 | 🐍 Python 2→3 | — |
| `tests/test_utils.py` | 951 | 🐍 Python 2→3 | — |
| `tests/test_requests.py` | 4 | 🐍 Python 2→3 | pickle.load() can execute arbitrary code from untrusted data; pickle.load() can execute arbitrary code from untrusted data |
| `src/requests/auth.py` | 3 | 🔒 Security Fix | MD5 is cryptographically broken; SHA1 is cryptographically weak |

## What LegacyFix does

| Fix Type | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| 🐍 Python 2→3 | Converts print statements, exception syntax, dict methods, string formatting |
| ⚡ JS Modernize | Replaces `var` with `const`/`let`, converts callbacks to arrow functions |
| 🔒 Security | Flags MD5, SHA1, eval(), Math.random(), SQL injection patterns |

## Review Checklist

- [ ] Review each file diff before merging
- [ ] Run your test suite
- [ ] Check security flagged lines manually
- [ ] Merge when confident ✅
